description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This signature leather and canvas belt from wrangler is all set to pump up your style. Pair it with casual wear. Length: 107 cm Width: 4.4 cm Made of canvas and leather Buckle with holes and a fixed loop to customise Fit Stripes in a lighter shade along the edge of the canvas for style Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
